name: Tax Exemption for Domestic Goods Purchased by U.S.

eligibility.description: Manufacturers or sellers of domestic goods subject to excise or other taxes when selling those goods directly to the United States government.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Exempts domestic articles from internal revenue taxes when purchased as supplies for the use of the United States, similar to the duty-free privilege for imported goods.
